name: model-training-ops
description: Operationalize model training on managed Kubernetes with an OSS stack: training-pipeline architecture (Argo Workflows/Kubeflow, trigger taxonomy, step caching, spot economics), MLflow experiment and registry conventions, distributed-training topology selection (Ray/Dask/Spark, allreduce vs parameter server), Ray on K8s via KubeRay, the notebook-to-production golden path, and prompt/RAG/PEFT/fine-tune strategy with LoRA workflows and evaluation protocol.
